title: Domain
description: A domain associated with a Fastly service, serving as the entry point for traffic routed through Fastly's edge network.

comment.description: A freeform descriptive note about the domain.

service_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the service.

version.description: The version number the domain is associated with.

created_at.description: The date and time the domain was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the domain was last updated.

deleted_at.description: The date and time the domain was deleted.
